name: Editorial Direct Successor Pipeline
description: Realistic content workflow with direct role-to-role handoff and no assessment gate.
outcome: A research memo becomes a publication-ready brief through direct successor handoff.

definition.process_instructions: The market researcher produces the initial memo. The managing editor immediately turns that memo into the final brief. This playbook has no specialist assessment and no human gate; once the editor finishes, the workflow can complete.

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: What this live workflow should accomplish

columns.label: Planned
columns.description: Work is defined but not yet assigned.

columns.label: Blocked
columns.description: Work is blocked and needs intervention.

columns.label: Done
columns.description: The work item meets its acceptance criteria.

stages.name: briefing
stages.goal: The publication brief is ready for release.

checkpoints.name: briefing
checkpoints.goal: The publication brief is ready for release.
